mapper.sql: select o.order_id, o.repair_id, o.user_id, o.user_name, o.user_room, o.user_phone, o.repair_type, o.repair_address, o.repair_desc, o.repair_images, o.order_status, o.create_time, o.update_time, o.remark, r.repair_id as r_repair_id, r.repairman_id as r_repairman_id, r.repairman_name as r_repairman_name, r.repairman_phone as r_repairman_phone, r.assign_time as r_assign_time, r.arrive_time as r_arrive_time, r.complete_time as r_complete_time, r.repair_cost as r_repair_cost, r.cost_desc as r_cost_desc, r.repair_result as r_repair_result, r.user_rating as r_user_rating, r.user_feedback as r_user_feedback from community_repair_order o left join community_repair r on o.repair_id = r.repair_id
mapper.select: select o.id, o.user_id, o.user_name, o.repair_type, o.order_status, o.repair_content, o.create_time, o.update_time, r.repairman_id, r.repairman_name, r.repairman_phone, r.assign_time, r.arrive_time, r.complete_time, r.repair_cost, r.cost_desc, r.repair_result from community_repair_order o left join community_repair r on o.repair_id = r.repair_id where o.user_id = #{userId} and o.user_name like concat('%', #{userName}, '%') and o.repair_type = #{repairType} and o.order_status = #{orderStatus} order by o.create_time desc

select o.id, o.user_id, o.user_name, o.repair_type, o.order_status, o.repair_content, o.create_time, o.update_time, r.repairman_id, r.repairman_name, r.repairman_phone, r.assign_time, r.arrive_time, r.complete_time, r.repair_cost, r.cost_desc, r.repair_result from community_repair_order o left join community_repair r on o.repair_id = r.repair_id where o.order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.update: update community_repair_order set repair_id = #{repairId}, user_id = #{userId}, user_name = #{userName}, user_room = #{userRoom}, user_phone = #{userPhone}, repair_type = #{repairType}, repair_address = #{repairAddress}, repair_desc = #{repairDesc}, repair_images = #{repairImages}, order_status = #{orderStatus}, remark = #{remark} where order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.delete: -- delete from community_repair_order where order_id = #{orderId} DELETE FROM community_repair_order WHERE order_id IN (${orderIds})
